name: tokencast
description: Pre-execution cost estimation for LLM agent workflows. Estimate before you run. Learn from actuals. Get more accurate over time.

tools.name: estimate_cost
tools.description: Estimate Anthropic API token costs for a development plan before execution

tools.name: get_calibration_status
tools.description: Get calibration health and accuracy metrics for cost estimates

tools.name: get_cost_history
tools.description: Query historical cost estimation records and actuals

tools.name: report_session
tools.description: Report actual session cost to improve future calibration

tools.name: report_step_cost
tools.description: Record the cost of a completed pipeline step. Costs accumulate per step and are flushed when report_session is called.
